message:
fix(utils): Correct GitHub URL and improve shell escaping

- Fix GitHub issue URL to correct repository
  (Dicklesworthstone/cass_memory_system)
- Add shellEscapeForUserCommand() for safe copy-paste suggestions:
  - POSIX: single-quote with proper escape sequence
  - Windows: single-quote with '' doubling for PowerShell
- Use safe escaping in generateSuggestedQueries() to prevent
  shell injection in suggested cass search commands
- Skip empty queries after trimming

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
